name: Pumpkin Spice Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 300°F.
2. Blend together the sugars and butter until smooth.
3. Add the egg, pumpkin, and vanilla extract; mix well.
4. Gradually add in the dry ingredients (flour, baking soda, salt, and pumpkin pie spice).
5. Stir in the raisins and chopped walnuts.
6. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto a greased or lined baking dish.
7. Bake for 23 minutes, or until set.
